downloadPage.title: Download & Install
downloadPage.subtitle: Choose an official path. One tap takes you to the official download/install flow, then follow the on-screen steps.
downloadPage.repoDocsDesc: Official sources, trust model, and how to verify downloads.

github.title: GitHub Releases
github.desc: Direct access to signed binaries and source code. Best for transparency and version history.

fdroid.title: F-Droid
fdroid.desc: The open-source app store for Android. Best for automated, verified updates.

directApk.title: Direct APK
directApk.desc: Direct download for Android. Best if stores are unavailable.

termux.title: Termux / CLI
termux.desc: For technical users, recovery, and automated environments.

downloadPage.trustNote: SunLionet is open-source. This page aims for a one-tap handoff: one clear action to an official source, plus guided next steps and verification. On Android, installs still require the standard system confirmation — the site cannot silently install apps.
downloadPage.warningMirror: Warning: Avoid unofficial mirrors or modified builds. If a file/tag/signature does not match the official release, stop and re-check.

installationPage.title: Installation Guide
installationPage.subtitle: Direct, verified install steps for all users. When a platform requires confirmation prompts, we guide you through them.

download.title: Download & Verify
download.desc: Download the official artifact and its checksum file. Verification ensures your file hasn't been tampered with.

android.title: Android Install
android.desc: Download the official APK, then tap it to start Android’s installer. Android will ask you to confirm and may require temporarily allowing installs from your browser or file manager.

linux.title: Linux / Desktop
linux.desc: Extract and run the install script. Supports systemd for automated recovery.

seeds.title: Trusted Seeds
seeds.desc: Import a configuration bundle from a trusted supporter to start your first connection.

installationPage.whyNoStoreDesc: We avoid centralized stores to prevent platform censorship and tracking. SunLionet is distributed directly to keep you in control of your software.
